metadata.notes: MVPD, TVOD/SVOD/AVOD/TVE workflows with published technical specifications. Partners without public ingest docs are omitted. Search distributorWorkflowAliases to match internal workflow names.

services.name: CableLabs MVPD Mezzanine
services.tagline: Unified US MVPD / TVOD / TVE file ingest (OC-SP-MEZZANINE)
services.description: CableLabs Mezzanine Encoding Specification defines a common H.264, MPEG-2, or ProRes mezzanine for file-based VOD and TVE delivery to cable, satellite, and telco operators. Many US MVPD store apps (Comcast, DirecTV, Cox, Dish, Verizon, Mediacom) ingest this profile after operator onboarding.
services.accessModel: Operator content operations / licensed packaging partner onboarding
services.revenueModel: Transactional VOD, operator SVOD store, and authenticated TVE feeds
businessModelNotes: HD H.264 mezzanine: 50 Mbps peak / 35 Mbps minimum; closed GOP max 90 frames; CABAC preferred.
Also accepts MPEG-2 and ProRes 422 mezzanine per CableLabs tables.
Individual operators (Comcast, DirecTV, Verizon, Cox, Dish) may add metadata-only or metadata+MEC requirements on top of this mezzanine.

deliveryOptions.name: HD H.264 mezzanine (CableLabs AVC)
deliveryOptions.purpose: Standard file-based VOD/TVE mezzanine to operators
deliveryOptions.summary: H.264 long-GOP mezzanine at 50 Mbps peak (35 Mbps minimum) for 1080p23.976/29.97 or 720p/1080p59.94 per CableLabs.

audioSpecs.label: Codec
audioSpecs.value: AAC or AC-3 per operator package

containerSpecs.label: Container
containerSpecs.value: MP4, MOV, or MPEG-2 TS per packaging partner

deliveryOptions.name: HD ProRes 422 mezzanine (CableLabs)
deliveryOptions.purpose: High-quality mezzanine when H.264 is insufficient
deliveryOptions.summary: ProRes 422 mezzanine option in CableLabs spec — 50 Mbps peak class for HD.

audioSpecs.label: Audio
audioSpecs.value: Embedded PCM or discrete per packaging partner

containerSpecs.label: Note
containerSpecs.value: Packaging partner transcodes to operator profiles

services.name: Google Play Movies & TV
services.tagline: Google TV partner / EMA avails + Deluxe NMS
services.description: Studio partners deliver TVOD/SVOD titles to Google Play Movies & TV via EMA avails and component packages (often through Deluxe NMS). Google publishes H.264 Hi422P encoding parameters; many studios never encode to Google directly.
services.accessModel: Google Partner Portal + PPH (e.g. Deluxe NMS) Aspera delivery
services.revenueModel: EST/TVOD and electronic sell-through via Google TV
businessModelNotes: Google states studio partners may deliver through Deluxe NMS so files need not conform before handoff — PPH still uses Google encoding spec.
Component delivery uses MovieLabs MMC + MEC metadata.

deliveryOptions.name: H.264 Hi422P (partner encoding spec)
deliveryOptions.summary: MP4/MOV H.264 Hi422P: 60 Mbps 1080 lines, 50 Mbps 720 lines, 15 Mbps SD; IBBP GOP; moov atom at front.

videoSpecs.label: GOP
videoSpecs.value: IBBP, max length ≤ ½ frame rate

containerSpecs.label: Rules
containerSpecs.value: No edit lists; moov atom at file start; deinterlace/inverse telecine required

services.name: Apple TV / iTunes Movies & TV
services.description: Transactional and subscription video on Apple TV app, iTunes Store, and Apple Channels billing uses iTunes Packages delivered with Transporter. Mezzanine sources are ProRes 422 HQ (films/TV); consumer assets are H.264 or HEVC inside the package.
services.accessModel: Apple encoding house / iTunes Connect Transporter
services.revenueModel: EST/TVOD, Apple Channels SVOD subscriptions, and Apple TV+
businessModelNotes: Apple TV+ originals catalog entry is separate — this row covers iTunes transactional and Channels DTC workflows.
Film/TV profiles require ProRes with valid QuickTime field handling tags.

deliveryOptions.name: Film / TV HD source (ProRes 422 HQ)
deliveryOptions.purpose: Movies and TV series masters in .itmsp
deliveryOptions.summary: Apple ProRes 422 HQ (or 4444 for HDR) in QuickTime — VBR ~176–220 Mbps class for HD per Apple profiles.

videoSpecs.label: Codec
videoSpecs.value: Apple ProRes 422 HQ (Film HD / TV HD source profiles)

videoSpecs.label: HDR
videoSpecs.value: ProRes 4444 / 4444 XQ + Dolby Vision CM metadata when applicable

audioSpecs.label: Layout
audioSpecs.value: LPCM per Apple TV/film audio profiles; Atmos for premium tiers

audioSpecs.label: Loudness
audioSpecs.value: Typically −18 LKFS integrated for Apple TV features

containerSpecs.label: Tooling
containerSpecs.value: Transporter CLI — verify with -m verify before upload

services.name: Comcast / Xfinity
services.tagline: Xfinity TVOD, TVE, and operator SVOD stores
services.description: Comcast and Xfinity VOD/TVE/SVOD store workflows typically ingest via CableLabs mezzanine via CableLabs mezzanine after onboarding. Separate onboarding for Xfinity On Demand, Channels Store SVOD DTC, and Unified Direct pipelines.
services.accessModel: Comcast content operations / licensed packaging partner
services.revenueModel: MVPD TVOD, authenticated TVE, and operator-billed SVOD channels

deliveryOptions.name: CableLabs mezzanine (via packager)
deliveryOptions.summary: Use CableLabs MVPD mezzanine — Comcast adds operator metadata via your PPH.

videoSpecs.label: Baseline
videoSpecs.value: See CableLabs MVPD Mezzanine catalog entry

containerSpecs.label: Metadata
containerSpecs.value: Operator MEC/MMC per Comcast Channels Store or Unified Direct

services.name: DirecTV / AT&T TV
services.description: DirecTV TVOD, SVOD DTC, AVOD, VOD/TVE, and C3 TVE workflows generally use CableLabs mezzanine ingest via CableLabs mezzanine after onboarding. Confirm C3 ad-insertion and DLID metadata with your DirecTV content operations contact.
services.accessModel: DirecTV content operations / licensed packaging partner
services.revenueModel: MVPD transactional, subscription channels, and TVE authentication

deliveryOptions.name: CableLabs mezzanine (via packager)
deliveryOptions.summary: CableLabs H.264/ProRes mezzanine per OC-SP-MEZZANINE — operator-specific ad markers for C3 TVE.

containerSpecs.label: C3 TVE
containerSpecs.value: Ad placement metadata required for dynamic ad insertion workflows

services.name: Verizon Fios TV
services.description: Verizon Fios TVOD and TVE workflows align with CableLabs mezzanine delivery through studio packaging partners.
services.revenueModel: Fios transactional VOD and authenticated TVE

deliveryOptions.name: CableLabs mezzanine (via packager)
deliveryOptions.summary: Deliver CableLabs-compliant mezzanine per operator onboarding.

services.name: Cox Communications
services.tagline: Cox Contour TVOD, TVE, and SVOD DTC
services.description: Cox SVOD DTC and Cox TVE/VOD workflows use CableLabs mezzanine through packaging partners.
services.revenueModel: Contour TVOD, operator SVOD, and TVE

deliveryOptions.name: CableLabs mezzanine (via packager)
deliveryOptions.summary: CableLabs mezzanine handoff — confirm Contour store metadata with PPH.

services.name: DISH Network / Sling TV
services.tagline: DISH TVOD, AVOD, SVOD DTC & Sling OTT
services.description: DISH satellite TVOD/AVOD/SVOD and Sling TV OTT unified workflows. Satellite/VOD mezzanine paths typically follow CableLabs; Sling Freestream FAST uses separate DISH onboarding.
services.revenueModel: MVPD TVOD, Sling subscriptions, and Freestream FAST
businessModelNotes: Sling Freestream FAST/AVOD has its own catalog entry.
Philo OTT (legacy integration) is a separate live-TV stack.

deliveryOptions.name: DISH VOD/TVOD (CableLabs mezzanine)
deliveryOptions.summary: CableLabs mezzanine for DISH TVOD/SVOD DTC — not used for Sling Freestream FAST.

services.name: Mediacom
services.description: Mediacom cable systems use CableLabs mezzanine for TVOD and operator SVOD channel store (DTC app) deliveries after content operations onboarding.
services.revenueModel: MVPD TVOD and Xtream SVOD store

services.name: Corus Entertainment (Canada)
services.tagline: Global TV & Corus specialty — broadcast MXF
services.description: Corus Entertainment (Shaw/Global Canada) publishes broadcast delivery specs requiring XDCAM HD422 50 Mbps in MXF OP1a — not ProRes for finished broadcast masters.
services.accessModel: Corus content operations / approved ad-delivery partners for commercials
services.revenueModel: Canadian broadcast affiliate and specialty carriage

deliveryOptions.name: Broadcast program (XDCAM HD422 50 Mbps MXF)
deliveryOptions.purpose: Acquired content for Global & Corus specialty
deliveryOptions.summary: 1920×1080i59.94 MXF OP1a, MPEG-2 XDCAM HD422 50 Mbps, 12-channel PCM layout, −24 LKFS.

containerSpecs.label: Textless
containerSpecs.value: Required at tail or separate file

services.name: Hayu
services.description: Hayu is NBCUniversal's reality-TV SVOD service (strong internationally). Delivery typically follows NBCU TechOps mezzanine specs — see NBCUniversal parent entry.

deliveryOptions.name: NBCU TechOps ProRes mezzanine
deliveryOptions.summary: Same NBCU TechOps ProRes 422 HQ path as Peacock/cable — onboard via TechOps.
